completedTasks: ai-service/workers/research.py — Tavily search + GPT-4o synthesis → ResearchBrief
ai-service/workers/context_manager.py — stub KB + GPT-4o positioning → WebknotContextOutput
ai-service/workers/packaging.py — python-pptx slide generation + real MinIO upload
ai-service/workers/dispatcher.py — research, context, packaging wired to real workers
backend/src/agents/orchestrator/pipeline-advance.ts — auto-advances pipeline when parallel step completes
backend/src/agents/orchestrator/index.ts — dispatches to Python AI service (BullMQ stub fallback)

keyDecisions.decision: Pipeline auto-advancement is fire-and-forget from the job-update callback
keyDecisions.rationale: Pipeline failure must not fail the callback response to Python. Python doesn't care about downstream pipeline state.

keyDecisions.decision: AI service dispatch with BullMQ stub fallback
keyDecisions.rationale: If Python ai-service is temporarily down, engagement doesn't hang — falls back to BullMQ stub which marks job complete. Recoverable.

keyDecisions.decision: MinIO upload in Python packaging.py via minio-py (sync wrapped in asyncio executor)
keyDecisions.rationale: minio-py is synchronous — run_in_executor keeps async event loop healthy.

nextAgentInstructions.warden: Review Sprint 2. Key checks: (1) pipeline-advance.ts — does it correctly detect when all parallel jobs in a step complete? Off-by-one in stepIndex? (2) internal.routes.ts — output cast to InputJsonValue safe? (3) packaging.py — MinIO error handling: if upload fails, does job still complete with fallback URL rather than crash? (4) research.py — if TAVILY_API_KEY missing, returns empty results + low confidence warning (not a crash)? (5) meetminds.routes.ts — does requireEngagementAccess middleware correctly protect the route? Auth header required?
nextAgentInstructions.kira: Update SPRINT-STATUS.md for Sprint 2. Set WARDEN: PENDING, SENTINEL: PENDING, AUTHORIZED: NO until both pass. Sprint 3 is next: Narrative Agent, Technical Solution Agent, Gate 1+2+3 machinery, multi-LLM compliance scorer.
